zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Leonard於1647年9月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德時，她的父親John Leonard32歲，母親Sarah Heath27歲。她於1665年11月10日與Samuel Bliss在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她於1647年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈特菲爾德。她去世於1723年1月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年75歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Leonard于1647年9月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德时，她的父亲John Leonard32岁，母亲Sarah Heath27岁。她于1665年11月10日与Samuel Bliss在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她于1647年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈特菲爾德。她去世于1723年1月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年75岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Leonard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English; French (Léonard); Walloon (mainly Léonard): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ (a late addition to the vocabulary of ancient Germanic name elements, taken from Latin) + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, which was taken to England by the Normans. A Christian saint of this name, who is supposed to have lived in the 6th century, but about whom nothing is known except for a largely fictional life dating from half a millennium later, was popular throughout Europe in the early Middle Ages and was regarded as the patron of peasants and horses. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Leonardo , Polish, Slovenian, etc. Lenart or Lenard , and probably also their derivatives. Compare Larned , Learned , and Yenor .
Irish (Fermanagh): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Fhionáin or of Langan .
German: variant of   Leonhard  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Leonardo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Fernando, Carlos, Ernesto, Felipe, Guillermo, Julio, Luz, Mario, Alberto, Altagracia.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Carmelo, Dario, Ercole, Filomena, Giuseppe, Marco, Mauro, Oreste, Pasco, Quintino.  Portuguese Joao, Paulo.
Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’ (see Leonard ).

variants.name: Langan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Declan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Longáin ‘descendant of Longán’, a personal name probably derived from long ‘tall’, or perhaps from a homonymous long ‘ship’ (and so originally a byname for a seafarer). Sometimes Leonard is used as an equivalent.

variants.name: Learnard
meanings: Altered form of English   Leonard  . Compare   Learned  .

variants.name: Lenhard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hermann, Kurt, Urs.
Dutch and North German: from the personal name Leonhard (see Leonard ).

variants.name: Lenhart
meanings: North German, and Czech: from the personal name Leonhard (see Leonard , Lenart ).

variants.name: Lence
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Joaquin, Caridad, Carmella, Delfina, Domingo, Fidelia, Marta, Roberto, Sergio.
Galician: habitational name from any of the four places called Lence.
Slovenian (Lenče): from a pet form of the personal names Lenart (see Leonard ) and Magdalena (see Maudlin ).

variants.name: Lehn
meanings: German:
from a short form of the personal name Leonhard, see Leonard .
habitational name from any of various places of that name.

variants.name: Learned
meanings: Altered form of English   Leonard  . An intermediate stage in this change is   Learnard  . Compare   Larned  .

History: William Learned was admitted to the First Church in Charlestown, MA, in 1632, and in 1640 was one of the first settlers of Woburn, MA. One of his better known descendants, Ebenezer, a revolutionary war officer, was born at Oxford, MA, in 1728.

variants.name: Lenard
meanings: English and Irish; French (Lénard): variant of Leonard , French Léonard.

Polish, German, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Lénárd); Slovak (also Lenárd and Lénárd): from local vernacular forms of the personal name Leonard (German Leonhard ). In North America, this surname may also be a shortened form of patronymics (and other derivatives) from this name, such as Croatian Lenardić and Slovenian Lenardič.

variants.name: Lenart
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Agnieszka, Bronislawa, Henryk, Henryka, Jacek, Janina, Leslaw, Stanislaw, Tadeusz, Witold, Zofia.

Polish, Czech, Slovenian, Croatian, and German; Slovak (Lenárt); Hungarian (Lénárt): from the personal name Lenart, Slovak Lenárt, Hungarian Lénárt, equivalents of Leonard (German Leonhard ). In North America, this surname may also be a shortened form of patronymics (and other derivatives) from this name, such as Polish Lenartowicz , Slovenian Lenarčič and Lenartič, Croatian Lenartić.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Leonard was born on 14 September 1647, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Leonard, was 32 and her mother, Sarah Heath, was 27. She married Samuel Bliss on 10 November 1665, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. She lived in Hatfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1647. She died on 1 January 1723, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 75, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Leonard est née le 14 septembre 1647, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Leonard, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sarah Heath, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Bliss le 10 novembre 1665, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Elle a vécu à Hatfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1647. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1723, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Leonard am 14. September 1647 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Leonard 32 und ihre Mutter Sarah Heath 27. Sie hat am 10. November 1665 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Samuel Bliss geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. 1647 hat sie in Hatfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1723 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Leonard è nata il il 14 settembre 1647 nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Leonard, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Sarah Heath, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Samuel Bliss il 10 novembre 1665, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Vissuto a Hatfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1647. Morì il 1 gennaio 1723, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Leonardが1647年9月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで生まれた時，父John Leonardは32歳，母Sarah Heathは27歳であった。1665年11月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドでSamuel Blissと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1647年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハトフィールドに住んでいた。彼女は1723年1月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで75歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hamps: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리
ko.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Leonard(이)가 1647년 9월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Leonard(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Heath(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1665년 11월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 Samuel Bliss(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1647년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 하트필드에서 살았다. 그녀는 1723년 1월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Leonard nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1647, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Leonard, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Heath, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Bliss em 10 de novembro de 1665, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela viveu em Hatfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1647. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1723, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Leonard родилась 14 сентября 1647 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Leonard было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Heath, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Bliss 10 ноября 1665 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Она жила в местности хатфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1647 году. Она умерла 1 января 1723 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Samuel Bliss el 10 de noviembre de 1665, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas. Vivió en Hatfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1647.
